# mlkem

```go
import "crypto/mlkem"
```

Package mlkem implements the quantum\-resistant key encapsulation method ML\-KEM \(formerly known as Kyber\), as specified in [NIST FIPS 203](<https://doi.org/10.6028/NIST.FIPS.203>).

Most applications should use the ML\-KEM\-768 parameter set, as implemented by [DecapsulationKey768](<#DecapsulationKey768>) and [EncapsulationKey768](<#EncapsulationKey768>).

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
package main

import (
	"crypto/mlkem"
	"log"
)

func main() {
	// Alice generates a new key pair and sends the encapsulation key to Bob.
	dk, err := mlkem.GenerateKey768()
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	encapsulationKey := dk.EncapsulationKey().Bytes()

	// Bob uses the encapsulation key to encapsulate a shared secret, and sends
	// back the ciphertext to Alice.
	ciphertext := Bob(encapsulationKey)

	// Alice decapsulates the shared secret from the ciphertext.
	sharedSecret, err := dk.Decapsulate(ciphertext)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	// Alice and Bob now share a secret.
	_ = sharedSecret
}

func Bob(encapsulationKey []byte) (ciphertext []byte) {
	// Bob encapsulates a shared secret using the encapsulation key.
	ek, err := mlkem.NewEncapsulationKey768(encapsulationKey)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	sharedSecret, ciphertext := ek.Encapsulate()

	// Alice and Bob now share a secret.
	_ = sharedSecret

	// Bob sends the ciphertext to Alice.
	return ciphertext
}
```

</p>
</details>

## Constants

<a name="SharedKeySize"></a>

```go
const (
    // SharedKeySize is the size of a shared key produced by ML-KEM.
    SharedKeySize = 32

    // SeedSize is the size of a seed used to generate a decapsulation key.
    SeedSize = 64

    // CiphertextSize768 is the size of a ciphertext produced by ML-KEM-768.
    CiphertextSize768 = 1088

    // EncapsulationKeySize768 is the size of an ML-KEM-768 encapsulation key.
    EncapsulationKeySize768 = 1184

    // CiphertextSize1024 is the size of a ciphertext produced by ML-KEM-1024.
    CiphertextSize1024 = 1568

    // EncapsulationKeySize1024 is the size of an ML-KEM-1024 encapsulation key.
    EncapsulationKeySize1024 = 1568
)
```

<a name="DecapsulationKey1024"></a>

## type [DecapsulationKey1024](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L133-L135>)

DecapsulationKey1024 is the secret key used to decapsulate a shared key from a ciphertext. It includes various precomputed values.

```go
type DecapsulationKey1024 struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="GenerateKey1024"></a>

### func [GenerateKey1024](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L139>)

```go
func GenerateKey1024() (*DecapsulationKey1024, error)
```

GenerateKey1024 generates a new decapsulation key, drawing random bytes from a secure source. The decapsulation key must be kept secret.

<a name="NewDecapsulationKey1024"></a>

### func [NewDecapsulationKey1024](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L150>)

```go
func NewDecapsulationKey1024(seed []byte) (*DecapsulationKey1024, error)
```

NewDecapsulationKey1024 expands a decapsulation key from a 64\-byte seed in the "d || z" form. The seed must be uniformly random.

<a name="DecapsulationKey1024.Bytes"></a>

### func \(\*DecapsulationKey1024\) [Bytes](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L162>)

```go
func (dk *DecapsulationKey1024) Bytes() []byte
```

Bytes returns the decapsulation key as a 64\-byte seed in the "d || z" form.

The decapsulation key must be kept secret.

<a name="DecapsulationKey1024.Decapsulate"></a>

### func \(\*DecapsulationKey1024\) [Decapsulate](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L170>)

```go
func (dk *DecapsulationKey1024) Decapsulate(ciphertext []byte) (sharedKey []byte, err error)
```

Decapsulate generates a shared key from a ciphertext and a decapsulation key. If the ciphertext is not valid, Decapsulate returns an error.

The shared key must be kept secret.

<a name="DecapsulationKey1024.EncapsulationKey"></a>

### func \(\*DecapsulationKey1024\) [EncapsulationKey](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L176>)

```go
func (dk *DecapsulationKey1024) EncapsulationKey() *EncapsulationKey1024
```

EncapsulationKey returns the public encapsulation key necessary to produce ciphertexts.

<a name="DecapsulationKey1024.Encapsulator"></a>

### func \(\*DecapsulationKey1024\) [Encapsulator](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L184>)

```go
func (dk *DecapsulationKey1024) Encapsulator() crypto.Encapsulator
```

Encapsulator returns the encapsulation key, like [DecapsulationKey1024.EncapsulationKey](<#DecapsulationKey1024.EncapsulationKey>).

It implements [crypto.Decapsulator](<https://pkg.go.dev/crypto/#Decapsulator>).

<a name="EncapsulationKey1024"></a>

## type [EncapsulationKey1024](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L192-L194>)

An EncapsulationKey1024 is the public key used to produce ciphertexts to be decapsulated by the corresponding DecapsulationKey1024.

```go
type EncapsulationKey1024 struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NewEncapsulationKey1024"></a>

### func [NewEncapsulationKey1024](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L198>)

```go
func NewEncapsulationKey1024(encapsulationKey []byte) (*EncapsulationKey1024, error)
```

NewEncapsulationKey1024 parses an encapsulation key from its encoded form. If the encapsulation key is not valid, NewEncapsulationKey1024 returns an error.

<a name="EncapsulationKey1024.Bytes"></a>

### func \(\*EncapsulationKey1024\) [Bytes](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L208>)

```go
func (ek *EncapsulationKey1024) Bytes() []byte
```

Bytes returns the encapsulation key as a byte slice.

<a name="EncapsulationKey1024.Encapsulate"></a>

### func \(\*EncapsulationKey1024\) [Encapsulate](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.go#L219>)

```go
func (ek *EncapsulationKey1024) Encapsulate() (sharedKey, ciphertext []byte)
```

Encapsulate generates a shared key and an associated ciphertext from an encapsulation key, drawing random bytes from a secure source.

The shared key must be kept secret.

For testing, derandomized encapsulation is provided by the [crypto/mlkem/mlkemtest](<https://pkg.go.dev/crypto/mlkem/mlkemtest/>) package.

<a name="EncapsulationKey768.Encapsulate"></a>

```go
func (ek *EncapsulationKey768) Encapsulate() (sharedKey, ciphertext []byte)
```

Encapsulate generates a shared key and an associated ciphertext from an encapsulation key, drawing random bytes from a secure source.

The shared key must be kept secret.

For testing, derandomized encapsulation is provided by the [crypto/mlkem/mlkemtest](<https://pkg.go.dev/crypto/mlkem/mlkemtest/>) package.
